---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
description: "Documentation standards for the skills catalog"
---

# Documentation standards

Apply the repository-wide guidance from `../copilot-instructions.md` to all Markdown.

## General guidelines

- Keep skill docs concise. A `SKILL.md` should state what the skill does and when to trigger it — not exhaustive tutorials.
- For catalog-wide docs, update both `README.md` and `docs/catalog.md` when skill/agent counts change.
- Record provenance: upstream source and how content was adapted.
- Use the `docs/` folder for onboarding and operational guides; keep repo-root docs minimal.
- Code snippets belong in `references/` files, not in `.instructions.md` files.
